caption: AI Forensics
name: ai_forensics
description: Adds forensic non-repudiation to AI agent activity, on top of the attribution introduced by the ai_operation profile and the ai_agent object (#1640/#1641). Attribution states which agent acted; this profile lets a record carry cryptographic proof that the agent acted — bound to its verifiable identity (ai_agent.uid) and the operating charter in force — and lets records be chained so an independent party can detect tampering. Designed to ride the same agent-layer event as ai_operation, and to reuse the delegation object (deferred in #1640) as the authorization anchor for forensic chains rather than redefining it.

attestation.description: A cryptographic attestation over this event, binding the record to the acting agent's verifiable identity and, optionally, chaining it to prior records for tamper-evidence.
